typeId.description: Canonical (`type:NS.T`), qualified, or short name of the type to count members of.

semantics.description: `reflectionDeclared` (default) = bit-exact System.Reflection DeclaredOnly count (compiler-generated/backing filtered, nested excluded, implicit ctor counted); `sourceSymbols` = graph child-symbol count (nested included, synthesized accessors/backing excluded).

profileScope.description: Optional. Define profile to scope extraction to. Currently must match the retained profile. INV-MULTI-DEFINE-IOP-001.
